summary: Vertical handheld bystander footage of the state arrival ceremony welcoming King Charles and Queen Camilla to the White House: a military jet flyover above the Washington Monument, then Trump and Melania standing with the King and Queen on the South Portico balcony with the presidential seal, US and UK flags, and a Marine band. Despite a high music score (likely the band/anthem), it is a single continuous recording of a ceremony with no cinematic editing, titles, or genre styling, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: RT @JamesBlairUSA: 'Welcoming the King & Queen to The White House.'
